info.name: Pi-hole API 6.0
info.description:
Pi-hole API 6.0 (**This version of Pi-hole API is still in development)**

Some calls require an API token for authentication, to obtain the token change the **"password"** variable in **Variables** and then run once**"Authentication\\Submit password for login".**

A Pre-request script will automatically add the **"Accept: application/json"** header if no "Accept" header is added to the requests.

query.description: Maximum number of clients to return, setting this to 0 will return all clients
